## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change (existing behavior changes — requires major version bump)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] CI / build tooling

## Target Branch

- [ ] `develop` — features, fixes, docs, refactoring (normal flow)
- [ ] `main` — hotfixes only (critical production bugs)

> All regular contributions must target `develop`. PRs targeting `main` directly will not be merged unless they are hotfixes.

Closes #

## Testing

- [ ] I added unit tests for new functionality
- [ ] I added or updated integration tests
- [ ] All existing tests pass locally (`mvn clean verify`)
- [ ] I tested manually against a real Spring Boot application

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style (Google Java Style Guide, 4-space indent)
- [ ] All public and protected APIs have complete Javadoc
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the `[Unreleased]` section
- [ ] I updated documentation in `README.md` if the change affects public behavior
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `test:`, `chore:`)
- [ ] I have not introduced any secrets, credentials, or hardcoded values
